creator: rob2g2-freebsd@bitbert.com
text:
I have examined the patch from OpenBSD for their recent security fix (009: SECURITY FIX: August 12, 2022; https://ftp.openbsd.org/pub/OpenBSD/patches/7.1/common/009_zlib.patch.sig) and found the same code snippet in FreeBSDs sys/contrib/zlib/inflate.c

maybe someone could have alook at it and patch it if necessary. thanks
